description: Quote around the visible best bid/ask and midpoint.
Use wall_mid as the anchor and fade short-term deviations.
Trade only when top-of-book volume imbalance is strong.
Use the microprice edge from best bid/ask sizes.
Improve the book by one tick where the spread allows it.
Sweep visible liquidity when it is favorable versus fair value.
Blend wall_mid, imbalance, and microprice into one signal.
